description: Collision-free re-cut of the Ghana RuleSpec selection. gh-rulespec-2026-07-12 carries duplicate structural ownership (act-766 document root in two scopes, act-896 in three), which the axiom-encode corpus resolver rejects release-wide. Replaces the five colliding scopes with the two 2026-07-21 consolidated scopes while keeping every other selection; every body-bearing descendant is preserved and the selection is citation-unique.
name: gh-rulespec-2026-07-21
